name: Millie 61" Floor Lamp - FLL4137 - Black/Natural - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the sleek and stylish Millie Floor Lamp, a perfect blend of functionality and aesthetics. Crafted with a sturdy metal body in a bold black finish, this lamp offers a stable and durable addition to any room. The natural rattan shade introduces a touch of organic warmth, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere with its soft, diffused light.

Designed with contemporary sensibilities, the Millie Floor Lamp stands at an impressive 72 inches in height, making it an eye-catching statement piece. Its dimensions ensure it fits comfortably within a variety of interior spaces, from living rooms to reading nooks. The lamp's footprint is considerate of your floor space, measuring 24.5 inches in width with a base depth of 15 inches, providing ample stability without being obtrusive.

Thoughtfully engineered, this floor lamp features an elegant curve that not only adds visual interest but also positions the light source perfectly for reading or illuminating a specific area. The combination of the metal body with the rattan shade makes for a versatile and adaptable design that can easily complement both modern and traditional decors.

Invite the Millie Floor Lamp into your home and experience an infusion of style and gentle illumination, tailored for lovers of modern design with a nod to natural elements.
